title: arabis holboellii var. brachycarpa
intro: Arabis holboellii var. brachycarpa, also known as Bracted Rockcress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits also include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Arabis holboellii var. brachycarpa can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
